calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2016 Off Calendar

Request For Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-16-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840

Patrick J. Richard, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, SYNERGI, INC.
No appearance by defaulted defendant INTELAFORM, INC., DOMAINE HEALTHCARE, INC., J. RANDALL HOGGLE,
Default of DefendantS has been duly entered.
Witness, Mellisa Andrade, sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.

Plaintiff's Exhibit:
1- Letter from Frank J. Farrell, M.D. dated 10/22/2015 and invoice (3 pages)
Court returned all exhibits to Plaintiff.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:
Damages: $218.926.76
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $450.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $219.376.76

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2016 Continued To Jul-27-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
